blocks.text: Reitan sits T43 after two rounds in Houston — needs a weekend charge to matter. The week more than compensates: F1 at Suzuka, Belgian cobbles, and Carlsen's tilt at the World Championship.
🏎️ Fri 03:30 — Japanese GP at Suzuka, Russell leads 2026 championship by just 4 points
🚴 Fri 11:52 — E3 Saxo Classic, Abrahamsen and Hoelgaard on the cobbles ahead of Ronde
🚴 Sun 11:00 — Gent-Wevelgem, Wærenskjold's best Spring Classic shot of the week
♟️ Wed 16:00 — Carlsen opens FIDE Candidates — the road to the World Championship begins
